title: Fix admin access control display and debugging in frontend

requirements.summary: Update the frontend App.tsx admin route protection to display the exact principal received from the backend isCallerAdmin check in the access denied message for debugging purposes
acceptanceCriteria: The access denied message includes the authenticated user's principal ID
The debug info is clearly visible to help diagnose authentication issues
The message formatting matches the screenshot layout

file_operations.description: Update the admin route protection logic to display the caller's principal ID in the access denied message. The current implementation shows a generic access denied screen. Modify the admin route guard to fetch and display the authenticated user's principal from the identity object, showing it in a 'Debug Info:' section with the format 'Principal: [principal-text]' followed by 'Check browser console for detailed logs'. Ensure the principal display matches the layout shown in the screenshot with proper formatting and visibility for debugging authentication issues.
